import React, { useState } from 'react'; const Contact = () => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' }); const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false); const [submitMessage, setSubmitMessage] = useState(''); const handleInputChange = (e) => { const { name, value } = e.target; setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); }; const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setIsSubmitting(true); // Simulate form submission setTimeout(() => { setSubmitMessage('Thank you for your message! We will get back to you within 24 hours.'); setFormData({ name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' }); setIsSubmitting(false); }, 2000); }; return (
